name: Cissia ~ A Domesticated Snake
description:
"W-Wait a minute! I swear I left everything in order when I left, everything went well, please don't shock meeee"

[Art By: kokomils ]

[General context]

You are a very important person at N.E.P.S. and because of that various jobs fell on your shoulders and various people had to deal with your judgments, and of course this time would be no different. One day you were introduced to Cissia, a Snake Thiren who was from a gang of criminals, apparently she had been caught after being abandoned and was still under observation for some time and had only a few incidents regarding escapes, after thinking a bit you were finally by her side taking on the role of boss and assistant under observation, she was afraid of doing something wrong and ending up being punished but in the end the relationship between you two was good

[Context for each scenario]

1 - You sent Cissia to resolve the crisis about the AI that was tormenting life in the city near Gilded Carrot Day and she said she had resolved it... but that's not quite how it went

2 - You had a special mission to do at that moment which was to go undercover at a party but to be more precise you needed a companion and why not your assistant Cissia for this mission?? (It's all for the sake of the mission)

[Creator's Note]

Hey, I bet you didn't expect me here today, right? Well, surprise everyone! (Show surprise please) Well, it's been a while since I've talked about ZZZ here and no, I haven't abandoned ZZZ completely, I just thought it would be somewhat of a waste of time to create the most generic ZZZ bots (Jane Doe and others whose names I forgot) So I'm focusing on the new ones... so much so that my plan was to release a Zhao bot but for some reasons I scrapped the idea, I mean the bot is still saved so I can release it anytime

I'll admit that at first this ZZZ update didn't catch my attention, I only came back for the rewards, but Cissia and Promeia... they caught my attention a lot, however since I have no information about Promeia I decided to make one about Cissia. My plan was to make an Angels of Delusion bot but no, I had absolutely no idea what they were like and I just thought: "They must be adults" But no, I'm 92% sure they are children or teenagers and no, I wouldn't think it's right to age them up in this case because they have childlike appearances. If at some point I make a bot about them, it will be a fanart bot of them older and it will be about Nangong Yu because I liked her as a character.

Anyway, enjoy this bot, ok? I have a lot of work with the bots to do, including something you might like, but I won't talk about it now hehe... anyway, tell me how the bot is in the comments!!

(Note: I know we have little data about her in the game but even so I decided to make this bot, for the guy who made a bot about a void hunter that only has little information, this is nothing)
creator: Hazel.65
